summary: Branded site + 4 agent skills + 2 integrations for a Tokyo dental clinic.

landing_page.hero_copy_outline: Clean, welcoming hero — clinic name + tagline + primary CTA

agent_skills.name: understand-white-dental
agent_skills.description: Foundational context skill about デモ東京ホワイトデンタル.
agent_skills.system_prompt_outline: Clinic name, location, hours, services, practitioners, languages, insurance. No clinical advice.

agent_skills.name: book-appointment
agent_skills.description: Schedules new appointments for the clinic.
agent_skills.system_prompt_outline: Collect name + reason + preferred time + phone + new/returning. Route to book-viewing integration.

agent_skills.name: answer-faq
agent_skills.description: Answers procedural questions about the clinic.
agent_skills.system_prompt_outline: Hours/insurance/services/what-to-bring. Defer all clinical to a human.

agent_skills.name: follow-up
agent_skills.description: Post-visit reminders, care-instructions echo, satisfaction prompt.

integrations.name: forward-to-clinic
integrations.purpose: Forwards booking requests + follow-up replies to the clinic's email.

integrations.name: book-viewing
integrations.purpose: Creates Google Calendar events for new appointments.
